I keep every human and non-human identity governed in a continuous path: each identity has a defined purpose and I revoke access immediately when unused or no longer required

I apply the same governed lifecycle to human and non-human identities: I document and enforce all Joiner/Mover/Leaver actions I remove any legacy or unmanaged identity such as LDAP service accounts
I enforce ADEO access policies including MFA ensure end-to-end accountability for privileged actions and route all virtual machine access through an approved bastion

I secure access to assets through ADEO Zero-Trust Network Access allowing only verified and context-validated users and I ensure keys rotate automatically and tokens are regularly validated
I enforce segregation of duties for human and robot identities: I automatically prevent toxic conflicts and I require peer-validated approval before activating any sensitive API or service privilege
I keep human and non-human access aligned with responsibilities: I monitor application recertifications and I evolve rotate and retire non-human identities as systems change
